rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.33+commit.64118f21"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[{"inputs":[{"components":[{"internalType":"address","name":"tokenIn","type":"address"},{"internalType":"address","name":"tokenOut","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint24","name":"fee","type":"uint24"},{"internalType":"address","name":"recipient","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"deadline","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"amountIn","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"amountOutMinimum","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint160","name":"sqrtPriceLimitX96","type":"uint160"}],"internalType":"struct ISwapRouter.ExactInputSingleParams","name":"params","type":"tuple"}],"name":"exactInputSingle","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"amountOut","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"payable","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"AgentGuardRouter","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Wraps Uniswap V3 SwapRouter \u2014 enforces policy BEFORE forwarding the swap. Flow: 1. Agent calls AgentGuardRouter.swap() instead of calling Uniswap directly 2. Router checks the agent's policy via AgentPolicy.enforceAndRecord() 3. If allowed \u2192 transfers tokens from agent, approves SwapRouter, executes swap 4. If policy violated \u2192 reverts. Funds never move. The agent's token approvals go to THIS contract, not to Uniswap. So the agent physically cannot bypass the policy by calling Uniswap directly (as long as the agent only approved AgentGuardRouter).","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/AgentGuardRouter.sol":"ISwapRouter"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":false,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"]},"sources":{"src/AgentGuardRouter.sol":{"keccak256":"0x72b4212d320fafa207838631d8f89704cb8d3f8422de657838f99af373024130","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://d7c683dba2e8e5566dda5492520ed2fdfbfec79452fd02a4c183498f6fbfd52a","dweb:/ipfs/QmPR23aZjvdNmDVsXNgrGKr2Td99mgpKRifETtadPG2qwg"]},"src/AgentPolicy.sol":{"keccak256":"0xa6d91d34f288767e3ae23576a6c39471c48542216bdb3876425816ce002d8569","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://fa1e850d0e40f5346cb9b0186dd7e5bfafc84f0af8e8fd492baaf289962b4fe0","dweb:/ipfs/QmQUondmKChSjj4r8QkJC4RP6JQeSk6jeokg1o16cZzsVY"]}},"version":1}
